name: Dr. Michael “Robby” Robinavitch
description:
Dr. Robby gives his (adult) puppy-boy his testosterone shot!!

be warned!! like literally all of my bots, it has that infantilizing/babying thing going on. and yeah, yeah you do call him daddy. if it wasn’t obvious from the title, TW for needles as well. yes, yes i did reuse part of the intro from my price demi-human bot. sue me smh. yes, you were a pup he bought from one of those websites advertising doggies. were you a stray or pampered little thing that got sold for a high price…? that’s up to you. i’m so, so excited for the second season of the pitt. also another bot is coming up soon and will be christmas-themed, don’t worry.
creator: salmons
